title: AGEC — Traceability
description: Product origin, manufacturing location and supply-chain traceability data required by the French Anti-Waste Law (Loi AGEC).

countryOfOrigin.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the product's origin.

manufacturingLocation.description: Location where the product was manufactured or assembled.

facilityId.description: Unique identifier for the facility (e.g. GLN).

mainComponents.description: Traceability of main components or raw materials.

qualityLabels.description: Quality or environmental labels and certifications held by the product.

supplyChainActors.description: Key actors in the supply chain for due diligence purposes.

identifier.description: SIRET, DUNS, or other business identifier.
